sourceNote: Procedure identity/category/order normalized from 'DHC-6 Full Drill Procedure Index Normal Split.xlsx'. Excel is the governing app display allow-list. Existing procedure steps preserved for later content review. Previous note: Generic MCC callout shell generated from procedure titles only. This is not an approved AFM/POH/QRH/checklist replacement. Curated to the DHC-6 Trainer Abnormal/Emergency procedure allow-list.
